subject: fix(nav): stack burger menu items vertically
body:
Pico CSS applies display:flex (row) to all nav ul elements.
The burger dropdown inherits this, causing menu items to render
horizontally instead of as a vertical list.

Override with explicit flex-direction:column on .burger-dropdown ul.

Tags: ui, bugfix, css
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
